action.reasoning: Observation: 3:1 weighting (best,best,best,v3) achieved new best 0.6743. The trend: 1:1=0.6686, 2:1=0.6716, 3:1=0.6743 — keeps improving. Have 2.26h, 5 iters left. Analysis: Try 4:1 (best,best,best,best,v3) to see if pushing further helps. Or try 3:1:1 with v4. Best.pt alone was 0.6644, so weighting toward it helps but pure best.pt is 0.6644 < 0.6743, so v3 contribution matters. Let me try 4:1 and 3:1:1 carefully. Decision: Try 4:1 first.
